summary: Iteration 51: Backend testing 100% passed (14/14 tests). Frontend tunnel (ngrok) unavailable due to infrastructure issue (ERR_NGROK_334). Code review confirms all 4 features correctly implemented.

integration_issues.issue: Expo ngrok tunnel returns ERR_NGROK_334 - ngrok infrastructure outage. This is external to application code.

feature_1_admin_planning_all_vehicles.details: GET /api/admin/vehicle-schedule returns ALL 6 vehicles including those with 0 reservations (e.g., Audi Q5 45 TFSI, Renault Kangoo Van)
feature_1_admin_planning_all_vehicles.evidence: reservations.tsx line 55: useState(true) for showAllVehicles, GanttChart.tsx line 88: filter checks showAllVehicles

feature_2_vehicle_detail_deleted.details: /app/frontend/app/vehicle/ directory does not exist. vehicles.tsx (line 128) and index.tsx (line 229) use /booking/${vehicle.id}

feature_3a_client_login_redirect.details: login.tsx line 62: router.replace('/(tabs)/reservations') for client role

feature_3b_booking_options.details: booking/[id].tsx lines 27-31: DEFAULT_OPTIONS array with GPS (CHF 10/jour), Siège enfant (CHF 8/jour), Conducteur supplémentaire (CHF 15/jour). Lines 79-89: allOptions merges vehicle options + defaults

feature_4_document_upload.details: profile.tsx lines 360-471: Document upload UI with Pièce d'Identité (Recto/Verso) and Permis de Conduire (Recto/Verso). data-testid attributes: upload-id-front-btn, upload-id-back-btn, upload-license-front-btn, upload-license-back-btn

feature_5_notifications_not_blank.details: GET /api/notifications returns 3 notifications for client. notifications.tsx hooks (useEffect, useCallback) correctly placed BEFORE conditional return (lines 96-108 before line 111)

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 requested features are correctly implemented
showAllVehicles defaults to true in reservations.tsx (line 55)
DEFAULT_OPTIONS in booking/[id].tsx correctly defines GPS (10), Siège enfant (8), Conducteur supplémentaire (15)
Client login redirect correctly points to /(tabs)/reservations for client role
Document upload UI has proper recto/verso sections for both ID and license
notifications.tsx hooks ordering is correct - all hooks before conditional return

success_rate.frontend: Unable to verify via browser - ngrok tunnel infrastructure issue

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - existing data sufficient for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs verified working (14/14 tests pass). Code review confirms all 4 features implemented correctly. Ngrok tunnel has infrastructure issues (ERR_NGROK_334) - external to application. Frontend code verified by file analysis.

rca_of_issues.ngrok_tunnel_unavailable: External infrastructure issue - ngrok tunnel returns ERR_NGROK_334. Check https://status.ngrok.com/ for outage status. This is not a code issue.
